mapper.select: SELECT HOUR(entry_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as count FROM parking_record WHERE DATE(entry_time) = #{date} GROUP BY HOUR(entry_time) ORDER BY hour

SELECT DATE(entry_time) as date, COUNT(*) as entryCount, SUM(CASE WHEN exit_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exitCount, COALESCE(SUM(fee_amount), 0) as revenue FROM parking_record WHERE DATE(entry_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(entry_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT '全部区域' as areaName, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(fee_amount), 0) as revenue FROM parking_record WHERE DATE(entry_time) = CURDATE()
